panels.title: System Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, health_score AS "Health" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Summarizes the current health of this subsystem.

panels.title: Temp

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: VPD

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit over time, one of the most important plant-stress signals in the greenhouse.

panels.title: State

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, state AS "State" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows greenhouse equipment or controller state over time.

panels.title: Cost

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, cost_total AS "Cost" FROM v_cost_today

panels.description: Shows operating cost behavior for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: DLI

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, dli_today AS "DLI" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows light availability or daily light integral behavior.

panels.title: Alerts

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, open_alerts AS "Alerts" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows current alerts relevant to this dashboard context.

panels.title: Total Cost

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cost_total) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Sum of electric + gas + water costs for the selected period.

panels.title: Electric

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cost_electric) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Electric cost = Σ(equipment runtime × watts × $0.111/kWh)

panels.title: Gas

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cost_gas) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Gas cost = heat2 runtime × 75K BTU × $0.83/therm

panels.title: Water

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cost_water) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Water cost = gallons used × $0.00484/gal

panels.title: kWh

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(kwh_estimated) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Estimated kWh from equipment runtimes × rated wattages

panels.title: Therms

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(therms_estimated) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Shows natural gas consumption over the selected period.

panels.title: Gallons

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(water_used_gal) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Shows water consumption over the selected period.

panels.title: $/Day Avg

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(AVG(cost_total)::numeric, 2) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0

panels.description: Average daily total cost across the selected period

panels.title: Equipment State Grid

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Heat 1"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'heat1' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Heat 2"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'heat2' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fan 1"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fan1' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fan 2"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fan2' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fog"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Vent"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'vent' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Grow Light Main"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_main' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Grow Light Grow"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_grow' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister South"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_south' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister West"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_west' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister Center"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Drip Wall"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'drip_wall' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Drip Center"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'drip_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Water Flowing"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'water_flowing' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: ON/OFF state for every equipment relay. Colors match across all dashboard panels.

panels.title: Daily Cost by Type ($)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), cost_electric AS "Electric"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), cost_gas AS "Gas"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), cost_water AS "Water"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

panels.description: Daily cost stacked by utility type.

panels.title: Daily Cost by Equipment ($)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz),
  ROUND((COALESCE(runtime_heat1_min,0)/60.0 * 1.500 * 0.111)::numeric, 2) AS "Heat 1",
  ROUND((COALESCE(runtime_heat2_min,0)/60.0 * 75000.0/100000.0 * 0.83)::numeric, 2) AS "Heat 2 (Gas)",
  ROUND((COALESCE(runtime_fan1_min,0)/60.0 * 0.052 * 0.111)::numeric, 2) AS "Fan 1",
  ROUND((COALESCE(runtime_fan2_min,0)/60.0 * 0.052 * 0.111)::numeric, 2) AS "Fan 2",
  ROUND((COALESCE(runtime_fog_min,0)/60.0 * 1.644 * 0.111)::numeric, 2) AS "Fog",
  ROUND((COALESCE(runtime_vent_min,0)/60.0 * 0.010 * 0.111)::numeric, 2) AS "Vent",
  ROUND((COALESCE(runtime_grow_light_min,0)/60.0 * 1.446 * 0.111)::numeric, 2) AS "Grow Lights",
  ROUND((COALESCE(water_used_gal,0) * 0.00484)::numeric, 2) AS "Water"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

panels.description: Daily cost per equipment. Electric: runtime × watts × $0.111/kWh. Gas: runtime × 75KBTU × $0.83/therm. Water: gallons × $0.00484/gal.

panels.title: Real-Time Power Draw (W)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), watts_total AS "Total"
FROM energy WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), watts_heat AS "Heater Circuit"
FROM energy WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), watts_other AS "General Circuit"
FROM energy WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Real power draw from Shelly Pro EM50. Ch0=general (fans/fog/vent/lights), Ch1=heater circuit.

panels.title: Actual vs Estimated Daily kWh

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date_trunc('day', ts)::timestamptz),
  ROUND((SUM(watts_total)/count(*) * 24.0/1000)::numeric, 2) AS "Actual (Shelly)"
FROM energy WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), kwh_estimated AS "Estimated (Runtime)"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND kwh_estimated > 0 ORDER BY date

panels.description: Compares measured daily electrical consumption against the system estimate.

panels.title: Estimated kWh (Period)

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(kwh_estimated) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Total estimated kWh for the selected time period.

panels.title: Cost Mix (%)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND((cost_electric/NULLIF(cost_total,0)*100)::numeric,1) AS "Electric %"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND((cost_gas/NULLIF(cost_total,0)*100)::numeric,1) AS "Gas %"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND((cost_water/NULLIF(cost_total,0)*100)::numeric,1) AS "Water %"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

panels.description: Shows operating cost behavior for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Runtime Hours by Equipment

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz),
  COALESCE(runtime_heat1_min,0)/60.0 AS "Heat 1",
  COALESCE(runtime_heat2_min,0)/60.0 AS "Heat 2",
  COALESCE(runtime_fan1_min,0)/60.0 AS "Fan 1",
  COALESCE(runtime_fan2_min,0)/60.0 AS "Fan 2",
  COALESCE(runtime_fog_min,0)/60.0 AS "Fog",
  COALESCE(runtime_vent_min,0)/60.0 AS "Vent",
  COALESCE(runtime_grow_light_min,0)/60.0 AS "Grow Lights",
  COALESCE(runtime_mister_south_h,0) AS "Mister South",
  COALESCE(runtime_mister_west_h,0) AS "Mister West",
  COALESCE(runtime_mister_center_h,0) AS "Mister Center"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

panels.description: Daily runtime hours per equipment. Stacked bars show total utilization.

panels.title: Water Efficiency (gal/mol DLI)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), gal_per_mol_dli AS "gal/mol"
FROM v_water_efficiency WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

panels.description: Shows water use or irrigation behavior over time.

panels.title: Gas Therms vs Outdoor Temperature

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), therms_estimated AS "Therms"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND therms_estimated > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND(AVG(m.outdoor_temp_f)::numeric,1) AS "Outdoor Temp"
FROM daily_summary ds JOIN v_climate_merged m ON m.bucket::date = ds.date
WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND therms_estimated > 0 GROUP BY ds.date ORDER BY ds.date

panels.description: Gas heating demand inversely correlates with outdoor temperature.

panels.title: Water Usage vs Outdoor Humidity

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), water_used_gal AS "Water (gal)"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND water_used_gal > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND(AVG(m.outdoor_rh_pct)::numeric,1) AS "Outdoor RH %"
FROM daily_summary ds JOIN v_climate_merged m ON m.bucket::date = ds.date
WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND water_used_gal > 0 GROUP BY ds.date ORDER BY ds.date

panels.description: Shows humidity behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Monthly Cost by Category

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('month',date)::timestamptz AS time, ROUND(SUM(cost_electric)::numeric,2) AS "Electric"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('month',date)::timestamptz AS time, ROUND(SUM(cost_gas)::numeric,2) AS "Gas"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('month',date)::timestamptz AS time, ROUND(SUM(cost_water)::numeric,2) AS "Water"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Shows operating cost behavior for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Monthly Summary

targets.rawSql:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month',date),'YYYY-MM') AS "Month",
  ROUND(SUM(cost_electric)::numeric,2) AS "Electric ($)",
  ROUND(SUM(cost_gas)::numeric,2) AS "Gas ($)",
  ROUND(SUM(cost_water)::numeric,2) AS "Water ($)",
  ROUND(SUM(cost_total)::numeric,2) AS "Total ($)",
  ROUND(SUM(kwh_estimated)::numeric,0) AS "kWh",
  ROUND(SUM(therms_estimated)::numeric,1) AS "Therms",
  ROUND(SUM(water_used_gal)::numeric,0) AS "Gallons",
  ROUND(AVG(cost_total)::numeric,2) AS "$/day"
FROM daily_summary WHERE cost_total > 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Summarizes monthly operating cost and usage across the main utility categories.

panels.title: Equipment Specs & Rates

targets.rawSql:
SELECT equipment AS "Equipment",
  description AS "Description",
  CASE WHEN wattage IS NOT NULL THEN wattage || ' W' ELSE btu_rating || ' BTU/hr' END AS "Rated",
  CASE WHEN wattage IS NOT NULL THEN '$' || ROUND((wattage/1000.0*0.111)::numeric,4) || '/hr'
       ELSE '$' || ROUND((btu_rating/100000.0*0.83)::numeric,4) || '/hr' END AS "Cost/hr",
  CASE WHEN wattage IS NOT NULL THEN 'Electric @ $0.111/kWh'
       ELSE 'Gas @ $0.83/therm' END AS "Rate"
FROM equipment_assets ORDER BY equipment

panels.description: Equipment ratings and utility rates used for cost calculations. Wattages calibrated from Shelly EM meter correlations.

panels.title: Heating Cost vs Solar Altitude

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), cost_gas AS "Gas Cost ($)"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_gas > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz),
  ROUND(AVG(m.solar_alt)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Solar Altitude"
FROM daily_summary ds
JOIN v_climate_merged m ON m.bucket::date = ds.date AND m.solar_alt > 5
WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)
GROUP BY ds.date
ORDER BY ds.date

panels.description: Shows operating cost behavior for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Actual kWh (Shelly, Period)
panels.description: Sum of average daily power from Shelly meter for the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(daily_kwh)::numeric, 1) AS v
FROM (
  SELECT date_trunc('day', ts)::date, AVG(watts_total)/1000.0 * 24 AS daily_kwh
  FROM energy WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  GROUP BY 1
) sub

panels.title: Estimate vs Actual Δ
panels.description: Difference between runtime-estimated kWh and Shelly meter actual. Positive = overestimate.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(ds.kwh_estimated) - SUM(sub.daily_kwh))::numeric, 1) AS v
FROM daily_summary ds
JOIN (
  SELECT date_trunc('day', ts)::date AS day, AVG(watts_total)/1000.0 * 24 AS daily_kwh
  FROM energy WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1
) sub ON ds.date = sub.day
WHERE $__timeFilter(ds.date::timestamptz)

panels.title: Water Budget (7 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date, total_gal, mister_gal, drip_gal, unaccounted_gal, gal_per_vpd_stress_hour FROM v_water_budget WHERE date > CURRENT_DATE - 7 ORDER BY date DESC

panels.description: Shows water use or irrigation behavior over time.

panels.title: Heating Cascade — Temperature vs Heater Activity

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), temp_avg AS "Indoor Temp (°F)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor Temp (°F)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 57 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat1 (Electric) ON" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'heat1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 55 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat2 (Gas) ON" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'heat2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('1 hour', ts, start => $__timeFrom(), finish => now()) AS time, locf(last(value, ts)) AS "Setpoint Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_low' AND value > 0 AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('month', ts) AS time, avg(temp_avg) AS "Avg Indoor Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '365 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('month', ts) AS time, avg(vpd_avg) AS "Avg Indoor VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '365 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('month', ts) AS time, sum(cost_total_usd) AS "Monthly Cost" FROM daily_summary WHERE ts > now() - interval '365 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: REVIEW — Seasonal Arc — Temperature, VPD, and Cost by Month
panels.description: A seasonal summary of the greenhouse problem: temperature pressure, VPD pressure, and operating cost across the year.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, value FROM (
  SELECT 'Electric heat (1 hr)'::text AS time, 0.167::double precision AS value
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Gas heat (1 hr)', 0.623
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Fog (1 hr)', 0.182
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Lights (1 hr)', 0.161
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Hot day total', 2.52
) s

panels.title: REVIEW — Cost of One Action — Intuitive Operating Cost Anchors
panels.description: A simple cost anchor chart for explaining what one hour of action actually costs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT f.ts AS time, f.solar_w_m2 * 0.315 AS "Approx Solar Gain Proxy" FROM weather_forecast f WHERE f.ts > now() - interval '30 days' ORDER BY 1

SELECT c.ts AS time, GREATEST(c.temp_avg - f.temp_f,0) * 4500 AS "Approx Cooling Rejection Proxy" FROM climate c JOIN weather_forecast f ON date_trunc('hour', c.ts)=date_trunc('hour', f.ts) WHERE c.ts > now() - interval '30 days' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: REVIEW — Cooling Pressure vs Cooling Opportunity
panels.description: A first-pass comparison between solar pressure and the temperature delta available for fan-based cooling. This is a proxy, but useful for storytelling.
